infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PMK Child needs your location to keep you safe and help your parents know where you are.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: PMK Child needs your location in the background to keep you safe even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: PMK Child needs your location to keep you safe and help your parents know where you are.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: PMK Child needs access to your photo library to let you share images with your family.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: PMK Child needs camera access to let you take and share photos with your family.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: PMK Child needs permission to save photos to your library.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PMK Child needs microphone access for voice messages.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow PMK Child to use your location to keep you safe.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow PMK Child to access your photos to share with family.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow PMK Child to use your camera to take photos.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow PMK Child to record audio for video messages.
